corrections.text: In the 'What We Know' section the article states 'Tung M. Luu is the first author,' adopting the rendering used in KAIST's release. The authoritative ICML 2026 program (icml.cc/virtual/2026/oral/71090) lists the first author as 'Minh-Tung Luu,' and the OpenReview record renders the name 'Tung Minh Luu.' All three refer to the same researcher; the canonical first-author rendering on the official conference program is 'Minh-Tung Luu.' The article discloses this variance later in 'What We Don't Know.'
